steps.description: Click the search icon in the "Samples" tab to activate the search functionality within the Microsoft 365 Agents Toolkit interface.
Type text: 'to do list spfx' in the search bar located within the 'Samples' section of the Microsoft 365 Agents Toolkit interface in Visual Studio Code.
Click the "Create" button for the "Todo List with SPFx" sample in the Microsoft 365 Agents Toolkit interface.
Click the "Default folder /home/vscode/AgentsToolkitProjects" field within the "Workspace Folder" dialog to specify the project root directory.
